values.name: query
values.value: SELECT * FROM analysis_reports WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 1

parameters.functionCode:
// Extract and format report data const report = $json[0] || {}; return [{ json: { reportId: report.id || 'N/A', title: report.title || 'Daily CRM Analysis Report', generatedAt: report.completed_at || new Date().toISOString(), overallScore: report.overall_score || 0, totalProperties: report.total_properties || 0, totalCustomers: report.total_customers || 0, totalDeals: report.total_deals || 0, keyInsights: report.key_insights || [], recommendations: report.recommendations || [], metrics: { leadsToday: report.metrics?.leads_today || 0, appointmentsToday: report.metrics?.appointments_today || 0, dealsClosedToday: report.metrics?.deals_closed_today || 0, revenueToday: report.metrics?.revenue_today || 0 }, htmlReport: generateHtmlReport(report) } }]; function generateHtmlReport(report) { return ` ${report.title || 'CRM Report'}

${report.title || 'Daily CRM Report'}

Generated on ${new Date(report.created_at || Date.now()).toLocaleString()}

${report.properties_total || 0}
Total Properties
${report.customers_total || 0}
Total Customers
${report.deals_total || 0}
Total Deals
${Math.round((report.overall_score || 0) * 10)}
Health Score (/10)

Key Insights

${(report.key_insights || []).map(i => `

• ${i}

`).join('')}

Recommendations

${(report.recommendations || []).map(r => `
${r.title || 'Recommendation'}: ${r.description || ''}
`).join('')}

This report was generated automatically by your CRM system.

© ${new Date().getFullYear()} Your Real Estate Company. All rights reserved.

`; }
